creator: Thomas.SParrevohn@btinternet.com
text:
The USB MCP55 Controller fails to attach in AMD64 Current leaving no
keyboards working etc.

Fix: 

Reverting to 6.2 RELEASE works - however that means that the system does
not run in SMP
How-To-Repeat: Boot the system in AMD64 Mode - I have pciconf/devinfo dumps available
